title: activity — feature keys
description: Business features this module publishes for tenant-facing UX. Resolved by the tenant client from GET /api/auth/me → data.features. Distinct from entitlements (quota + gate) — features control whether the UI SHOWS a capability.

features.description: Enables the 'Recent activity' dashboard widget + the /activities screen. Available on every plan — activity capture is a baseline feature.
Real-time WebSocket streaming of activity to the dashboard. Available from Small plan up — free-tier tenants fall back to 15s polling on the same endpoint.
Surfaces the 'Daily / weekly summary of activity' toggle in /settings/notifications. Users can opt in per-cadence. Medium plan+.
Surfaces the ActivityRetentionPolicy CRUD UI. Without this feature, retention is fixed at the config default (90d). Enterprise-only.
Surfaces the 'Export CSV' button on the activity feed screen. Downloads asynchronously. Medium plan+.

Enables the 'Alice made 3 changes to Booking X' collapsed rendering when multiple same-batch activities fire in one request. Off = every activity surfaces individually. Available on every plan; controlled by feature flag for incident-response toggling.
